---
name: Feature idea
about: Suggest a capability or change for fascicle
title: ''
labels: enhancement
---

## The problem

What are you trying to do that fascicle makes hard or impossible today? Describe
the use case, not just the proposed solution.

## Proposed direction

What you imagine the API or behavior looking like. A rough sketch is fine.

```ts
// optional: how you'd want to call it
```

## Alternatives considered

Workarounds you have tried, and why they fall short.

## Notes

Fascicle is intentionally small and composition-first. Ideas that compose with the
existing primitives, rather than adding framework surface, are the easiest to land.
See the [roadmap](https://github.com/robmclarty/fascicle/blob/main/docs/roadmap.md)
for what is already planned or deliberately deferred.
